description: Use this API to return complex load quantities. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr, cmpval = loddt2(ibus, id ,string1, string2)

parameters.name: string1
parameters.description: String indicating the load characteristic desired. (input).

parameters.name: string2
parameters.description: String indicating the units to be used. (input).

return_values.name: cmpval
return_values.description: Complex value indicated by string1 in the units indicated by string2. (output).

string2.description: actual load (nominal load for STRING1 = ‘YNEG’ or ‘YZERO’). ‘P’ ‘Q’ returned in MW Mvar.
actual load (nominal load for STRING1 = ‘YNEG’ or ‘YZERO’). ‘P’ ‘Q’ in units determined by the power output option setting.
nominal load (at 1.0 pu voltage). ‘P’ ‘Q’ returned in MW Mvar.
nominal load (at 1.0 pu voltage). ‘P’ ‘Q’ in units determined by the power output option setting.

error_codes.description: bus not found; ‘P’ and ‘Q’ or ‘CMPVAL’ unchanged.
load not found; ‘P’ and ‘Q’ or ‘CMPVAL’ unchanged.
bus type code is not 1, 2 or 3; ‘P’ and ‘Q’ or ‘CMPVAL’ returned.
invalid value of ‘STRING1’ or ‘STRING2’; ‘P’ and ‘Q’ or ‘CMPVAL’ unchanged.
sequence data not in case for ‘STRING1’ = ‘YNEG’ or ‘YZERO’; ‘CMPVAL’ unchanged.
